title: 8×10 Is the #1 Searched Frame Size on Etsy — Are You Listed?
description: 8×10 is the most-searched print size on Etsy — and most sellers don't list it. It's a 4:5 ratio (2400×3000px at 300 DPI). SnapToSize generates all 4:5 sizes automatically — 8×10, 16×20, 24×30 — as part of every upload. Plus ISO A-series for EU, UK, and Australia buyers. Upload once. Cover every buyer.
